taxonomy_v3: Engineering and Development, Software Engineering, Backend Software Engineer
core_skills: Backend Development, Distributed Systems, Java, Python, Golang
skill_match_scores: Backend Development:1.0, Distributed Systems:0.0, Java:1.0, Python:1.0, Golang:1.0
must_have_quals: 3-4 years building production software with a focus on backend and distributed systems, Proficient in Java, Python, or Golang, with experience building and consuming APIs, Built scalable, reliable systems for real-time ticketing, barcode validation, and post-purchase workflows, Designed async pipelines and streaming systems (Kafka or similar) to handle peak traffic with zero breakage, Integrated third-party APIs, with bonuses for experience in venue systems, barcode providers, or mobile wallets, Operated cloud services (AWS, GCP, Azure), delivering features that improve reliability and power seamless experiences at scale
core_responsibilities: Design, implement, and operate backend services and integrations powering the post-purchase fulfillment pipeline (barcode validation, mobile wallets, partner APIs, & inventory reconciliation), Build 0-to-1 fault-tolerant systems and async pipelines (queues/streaming) that scale for peak event traffic and ensure idempotent, reliable delivery, Own features end-to-end: from requirements and architecture to implementation, testing, deployment, monitoring, and runbooks, Collaborate cross-functionally with Product, Data, and QA, as well as two Operations partners:Active Support: enhances the post-purchase customer experience and builds tools for fans and support agents. Marketplace Operations: drives inventory quality and supply across events, Instrument services with robust observability: metrics, logs, distributed traces, and alerting to proactively detect and reduce fulfillment breakage
job_summary: StubHub is on a mission to redefine the live event experience on a global scale. The Fulfillment team ensures that every ticket delivered is valid, and as a Software Engineer II, you'll build end-to-end post-purchase flows and partner integrations to drive reliability improvements and measurable business impact.
